Class IsabelleProblem

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.isabelletranslation.automation.IsabelleProblem
public class IsabelleProblem extends Object
This class represents an Isabelle problem. It contains the goal corresponding to the problem, as well as the content of the preamble and translation theory.

  • Constructor Summary

    Creates a new problem for the given goal.

  • Constructor Details

    • IsabelleProblem

      public IsabelleProblem(Goal goal, String preamble, String translation)
      Creates a new problem for the given goal.
      Parameters:
      goal - the goal associated with this problem
      preamble - content of the preamble theory
      translation - content of the translation theory

      public String getName()

    • writeTranslationFiles

      public void writeTranslationFiles(IsabelleTranslationSettings settings) throws IOException
      Writes the contents of the preamble and translation theory to the files specified in the IsabelleTranslationSettings. If the files and directories are not already present, they are created.
      Parameters:
      settings - settings to be used
      Throws:
      IOException

    • hasTranslation

      public boolean hasTranslation()
      Checks if a translation, preamble are present
      Returns:
      true - both translation and preamble are present, false - otherwise

    • getTranslationException

      public IllegalFormulaException getTranslationException()
